Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

John Clair Miller image collection of twentieth-century architecture in Iceland., 2017
Collection Number: 8579

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
John Clair Miller image collection of twentieth-century architecture in Iceland., 2017
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
8579
Creator:
Miller, John Clair.
Miller, John Clair.
Cornell University. Library. Digital Collections
Quanitities:
615 items.
Scope and content

The John Clair Miller Image Collection of Twentieth-Century Architecture in Iceland contains photographic images made by Professor Miller of more than a dozen architectural installations in Reykjavík and in other locations in Iceland (also some in Finland). Architectural projects include private residences, lighthouses, places of worship, and government buildings.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Preferred Citation

John Clair Miller Image Collection of Twentieth-Century Architecture in Iceland, #8579. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Existence and Location of Originals

Original 35mm slides retained by John Clair Miller.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Miller, John Clair.
Subjects:
Architecture -- Iceland -- 20th century.
Architecture -- Finand -- 20th century.
